translations.name: Artificial Intelligence
translations.description:
Artificial intelligence powers products that can write, reason, analyze data, and take action for you. These categories cover the main ways AI is being built and used today.

- **[AI Agents](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/ai-agents)** – Tools that use AI to plan, reason, and take actions across tools and workflows, often completing multi-step tasks with minimal human input.
- **[LLMs](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/llms)** – Platforms and tools built around large language models that enable text generation, understanding, and reasoning across many applications.
- **[AI Infrastructure](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/ai-infrastructure)** – Products that support training, deploying, scaling, and evaluating AI models, including hosting, inference, data pipelines, and observability.
- **[AI Chatbots](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/ai-chatbots)** – Applications that use AI to power conversational experiences for support, productivity, research, and user interaction.
- **[Predictive AI](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/predictive-ai)** – AI-powered tools that analyze data to forecast outcomes, detect patterns, and support decision-making.

translations.name: API
translations.description:
API-first products make it easy for developers to build, integrate, and scale software. Check out these categories to explore the tools and platforms teams use to ship and adopt APIs:

- **[Unified APIs](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/unified-api)** – APIs that abstract multiple services behind a single interface, making integrations faster and reducing maintenance overhead.
- **[Platforms](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/platforms)** – Developer platforms that expose APIs as the primary way to access infrastructure, data, or services.
- **[AI Infrastructure](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/ai-infrastructure)** – Infrastructure products that provide APIs for model inference, embeddings, data pipelines, and AI system orchestration.
- **[Authentication & Identity](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/authentication-identity)** – APIs for handling user authentication, authorization, identity management, and access control.

translations.description: You could look outside to see if it's raining, or you could look at your smartphone. Predict the future and plan your day with magical, fortune-telling weather apps.

translations.name: Newsletters
translations.description: Email is far from dead. In fact, it's home to some of the best content on the Internet, like the Product Hunt daily digest. 😁

translations.name: Events
translations.description: Planning a wedding, party, or brunch with friends? These tools will help.

translations.name: Parenting
translations.description: Be knowledgeable and enjoy the wild ride of parenthood. If you need help, there are some great resources and apps for you and your family.

translations.name: Adult Coloring Books
translations.description: Coloring books aren't just for kids. Take a load off and relax with color. Just make sure to stay in the lines. 🎨

translations.name: Wine
translations.description: These products have notes of greatness and legs for dripping into your nightly rotation.

translations.name: Surfing
translations.description: Cowabunga my dudes & dudettes! Snag a board and let's hit the water. 🏄

translations.name: Dogs
translations.description: That fuzzy 'ol pup with the tongue out is your best friend. There are lots of ways to show him your love so make sure he's got the best care to keep your canine smiling. 🐶

translations.name: Art
translations.description: There are a million ways to create art and there are many tools to help get those creative juices flowing. Express yourself!

translations.name: Fashion
translations.description: You've got the front seat at this catwalk. What's going in the bag?

translations.name: Home
translations.description: Live in the future with the latest in connected devices, furniture built for comfort, and robots. Yes, robots.

translations.name: Freelance
translations.description: We see you, freelancer. Your mission is a grind but helpful tools and community are here.

translations.name: Sales
translations.description: A great product isn't much without sales. Improve your conversation and get to the close with some of these useful tools.

translations.name: Jewelry
translations.description: Breakfast at Tiffany's isn't a bad way to start your day, but there are many options to add flair with your attire. Find the perfect design that speaks to you or make your own piece that's unique to you.

translations.name: Video Streaming
translations.description: Still watching? Obviously. Take a break to scroll through the latest in streaming.

translations.name: Standing Desks
translations.description: If the science says stand, we're going to stand 👫. From $25 to $2,500, there's a standing desk for everyone.

translations.name: SoundCloud
translations.description: Explore the largest community of artists, bands, podcasters and music creators, and all the apps built on top of this amazing platform for sound.

translations.name: Spotify
translations.description: What's your favorite way to stream the best music? Set the mood with a perfect playlist or start the party bumpin with the illest bangers. 🎶

translations.name: Amazon
translations.description: The "bookstore" that sells T.P. and anything you're looking for.

translations.name: Instagram
translations.description: Did you know you can schedule your Instagram posts, turn your best photos into edible marshmallows, and get detailed analytics for all your pics? There are apps for that. 📷

translations.name: Anonymous
translations.description: Who are you? Who are you talking about? Does he know who she is? 👻 I don't know either.

translations.name: Messaging
translations.description: Plain text can be so boring. Find a new way to spice up your communication.

translations.name: Sneakers & Shoes
translations.description: Sneakers, stilettos, or crocks with socks? We don't judge but you can.

translations.name: Music
translations.description: Skip or repeat? Is your new favorite tunage here?

translations.name: Customer Success
translations.description: Name something better than a delightful customer experience. We'll wait.

translations.name: Custom Keyboards
translations.description: Keyboards are for more than just typing. Share your location, send the perfect GIF, and speak in emojis using fancy custom keyboards on your iPhone.

translations.name: DJ Khaled
translations.description: "Anotha one," raise your hand if you already know who we're talking about.

translations.name: Celebrities
translations.description: We love a Hollywood meets tech crossover.

translations.name: Politics
translations.description: Left wing, Right wing, Green Party, Anarchist, Tea Party... the list goes on. Get political!

translations.name: News
translations.description: Stay in the know. Keep up to date. See what's going on in the world.

translations.name: Alarms
translations.description: Still using the default alarm on your phone? Try something new, but warning: not all of them come with a snooze button. 😴

translations.name: Task Management
translations.description: Managing your time is hard without a plan. Make a list, check it twice, see which tasks are easy and nice. ✔︎

translations.name: Productivity
translations.description: If time is most precious, this collection of lifehacks is so so precious. Be more productive and optimize your life.

translations.name: Emoji
translations.description: Be more expressive with your communication. 😁😮😜

translations.name: Design Tools
translations.description: Design is more than just pretty pixels (no offense, pretty pixels). A good design tool can upgrade your UX, improve your workflow and help bring your creative ideas to life

translations.name: Health & Fitness
translations.description: Losing weight? Gaining weight? There are so many resources available, from calorie counting apps to personal coaches in your pocket. 💪

translations.name: Funny
translations.description: Knock knock. Who's there? Bad Jokes, cat puns and more. Get ready to LOL right meow.

translations.name: Hiring
translations.description:
API-first products make it easy for developers to build, integrate, and scale software. Check out these categories to explore the tools and platforms teams use to ship and adopt APIs:

- **[Unified APIs](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/unified-api)** – APIs that abstract multiple services behind a single interface, making integrations faster and reducing maintenance overhead.
- **[Platforms](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/platforms)** – Developer platforms that expose APIs as the primary way to access infrastructure, data, or services.
- **[Developer Tools](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/llm-developer-tools)** – Tools that help developers design, test, document, and maintain APIs throughout the development lifecycle.
- **[AI Infrastructure](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/ai-infrastructure)** – Infrastructure products that provide APIs for model inference, embeddings, data pipelines, and AI system orchestration.
- **[Authentication & Identity](https://www.producthunt.com/categories/authentication-identity)** – APIs for handling user authentication, authorization, identity management, and access control.

translations.name: Email
translations.description: Love it or hate it, electronic mail is a huge part of your life but fortunately there are so many apps and extensions to make it more managable. PSA: Please don't "Reply All" to everything. 😁

translations.name: Tabletop Games
translations.description: Gather your friends and play some games around a table (or floor... tabletop games also work on that platform).

translations.name: Board Games
translations.description: Nothing more heart-warming than getting your peeps together and arguing over a game of [fill in the blank].

translations.name: Chrome Extensions
translations.description: Level up your Chrome with super browser extensions. Happy surfing. 🏄

translations.name: Drones
translations.description: It’s a bird! It’s a plane! Nope, it's a drone. Unmanned aerial vehicles are growing in popularity, from the DGI Phantom to the autonomous Lily drone. Even Amazon may deliver T.P. from the sky soon.

translations.name: Virtual Reality
translations.description: Time to put on your VR headset. We'll see you in the metaverse.

translations.name: Telegram
translations.description: The free, multiplatform messaging app used by over 100 million people every month is home for bots for every use case. Here are some of the best integrations.

translations.name: Ridesharing
translations.description: Get from A to B, the smartest way. Your private driver, on-demand.

translations.name: Gear VR
translations.description: Slip into the world of virtual reality whenever you want to the Samsung Gear VR.

translations.name: Apple TV
translations.description: After a long day at the office, find solitude in the vast world of TV and film on your Apple TV. Couch not included. 📺

translations.name: HTC Vive
translations.description: Steam's take on virtual reality (VR), focused on mobility and great gaming.

translations.name: PlayStation VR
translations.description: The Sony PlayStation aims to bring virtual reality (VR) to anyone with a PS4. No costly PC needed.

translations.name: Oculus Rift
translations.description: Facebook's Oculus is looking to revolutionize the way we consume media and communicate with the world, through virtual reality (VR).

translations.name: Slack
translations.description: Real-time chat with everyone. Use it with your team, family, and friends.

translations.name: Web App
translations.description: You know that place with all those cat pics and GIFs? It also has some other neat stuff.

translations.name: Mac
translations.description: The legendary foundations of Apple Computers. They're easy to use and easy to love. Go ahead, hop on the 🍎 bandwagon.

translations.name: Windows
translations.description: The Personal Computer changed the way we live and work, created by the legendary Bill Gates with the vision to put a "computer on every desk".

translations.name: eBook Reader
translations.description: Collect and read books that won't gather dust on the handy, portable Amazon Kindle.

translations.name: Browser Extensions
translations.description: Browser extensions are add-ons that upgrade your web experience: privacy shields, writing fixes, task capture, real‑time collaboration, dev tooling, and AI.

translations.name: Safari Extensions
translations.description: Safari Extensions add tools to Apple’s browser, from privacy and ad blocking to bookmarking, note‑taking, and focus timers for students, pros, and teams.

translations.name: Linux
translations.description: For those who love to customize their OS to their own likings. Fedora, Red Hat, Ubuntu. You'll have your pick.

translations.name: Apple Watch
translations.description: When you don't have enough notifications on your Phone to distract you, get them on your wrist. Apple's sexy wearable might change your life.

translations.name: Card Games
translations.description: Did you know that card games used to be played IRL with laminated paper instead of on an iPad? Crazy, right?!

translations.name: iPad
translations.description: A slab of Apple computing genius, now in multiple tablet sizes: Mini, Air, and Pro.

translations.name: iOS
translations.description: The beloved "phone" that changed the way we communicate, play games, and snap photos. 📱

translations.name: Wii U
translations.description: Relive your childhood with Mario, Zelda, and Pokemon on Nintendo's motion-sensing console.

translations.name: Nintendo
translations.description: The king of handheld gaming is still on top. Play the classics, from Mario to Pokemon, reimagined in 3D without the need for dorky glasses.

translations.name: Vita
translations.description: Sony's second handheld brings console quality games straight to your fingertips. Play Vita exclusives or even stream games directly from your PS4.

translations.name: Playstation
translations.description: Playstation gathers console gaming essentials: blockbuster shooters, retro action, sandbox builders, dev engines, chat, guides, and timely Plus game alerts.

translations.name: XBox
translations.description: Microsoft's console brings you awesome games like Halo and Gears of War and doubles as a killer home media device.

translations.name: Android
translations.description: One of the fastest growing platforms of all time, the little green bot lives in your pocket and does just about anything.

translations.name: PC
translations.description: PC groups software and hardware that power computing: private browsing, search, AI aid, 3D creation, design, cloud GPUs and gaming for gamers, makers, teams.
